Rankings should sort by score descending, then wins descending, then penalties ascending, and finally by name alphabetically. Tied players must share the same rank number, and the next rank should skip accordingly.

steps.find:
ordered
        .into_iter()
        .enumerate()
        .map(|(i, p)| RankedPlayer {
            rank: i + 1,
            name: p.name,
            score: p.score,
            wins: p.wins,
            penalties: p.penalties,
        })
        .collect()
